description: PrintNode integration for label printing: client lib, printer config per galpão/user, admin UI in settings page

userStories.title: Migration: add PrintNode printer columns to galpoes and usuarios
userStories.description: As the system, I need database columns to store the configured PrintNode printer for each galpão and optional user override.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration file supabase/migrations/20260311_add_printnode_config.sql
ALTER siso_galpoes ADD COLUMN printnode_printer_id bigint, ADD COLUMN printnode_printer_nome text
ALTER siso_usuarios ADD COLUMN printnode_printer_id bigint, ADD COLUMN printnode_printer_nome text
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: PrintNode client lib (printnode.ts)
userStories.description: As the system, I need a PrintNode API client to test connections, list printers, send print jobs, and resolve which printer to use.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/printnode.ts
Export async function testarConexao(apiKey: string): Promise<{ ok: boolean; email?: string; error?: string }> — calls GET /whoami
Export async function listarImpressoras(apiKey: string): Promise<PrintNodePrinter[]> — calls GET /printers, returns array with id, name, computer name, state

Export async function enviarImpressao({ apiKey, printerId, pdfUrl, titulo }): Promise<{ jobId: number }> — calls POST /printjobs with contentType 'pdf_uri', content = pdfUrl, source = 'SISO Separacao'

Export async function resolverImpressora(usuarioId: string, galpaoId: string): Promise<{ printerId: number; printerNome: string } | null> — checks usuario.printnode_printer_id first, falls back to galpao.printnode_printer_id, returns null if neither set
Auth via HTTP Basic: base64(apiKey + ':') as Authorization header
enviarImpressao has 10s timeout and retries 1x on network error
Export PrintNodePrinter interface with id (number), name (string), computer (string), state (string)
Log print jobs via logger (pedido context, printer_id, job_id — no URLs for LGPD)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin API routes for PrintNode (test + list printers)
userStories.description: As an admin, I need API endpoints to test the PrintNode connection and list available printers for configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/admin/printnode/test/route.ts with POST handler
POST /api/admin/printnode/test reads PRINTNODE_API_KEY from process.env, calls testarConexao(), returns { ok, email } or { ok: false, error }
Create src/app/api/admin/printnode/printers/route.ts with GET handler
GET /api/admin/printnode/printers reads PRINTNODE_API_KEY from process.env, calls listarImpressoras(), returns printer array
Both endpoints return 500 { error: 'PRINTNODE_API_KEY não configurada' } if env var is missing
Both endpoints validate admin cargo (check session or simple cargo check) — return 403 if not admin
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: PrintNode configuration UI in settings page
userStories.description: As an admin, I need a section in the settings page to test PrintNode connection and assign printers to galpões and users.
acceptanceCriteria: Add new section 'Impressão (PrintNode)' to src/app/configuracoes/page.tsx, below existing Tiny connections section
Button 'Testar Conexão' calls POST /api/admin/printnode/test and shows status (green check with email on success, red X with error on failure)
After successful connection test, fetch and display available printers from GET /api/admin/printnode/printers

For each galpão, show dropdown 'Impressora padrão etiqueta' populated with PrintNode printers — saving updates siso_galpoes.printnode_printer_id and printnode_printer_nome via PUT /api/admin/galpoes/{id}
For each user, show optional dropdown 'Impressora override' — saving updates siso_usuarios.printnode_printer_id and printnode_printer_nome via PUT /api/admin/usuarios
When no printer is configured for a galpão, show yellow warning 'Nenhuma impressora configurada'
Section only visible to admin users
Typecheck passes
